seasonTagline: You glow in the delicate, misty colors of a cool summer morning — think soft sea glass, pale peonies, and hazy skies.
skinDescription: Your skin is fair and porcelain-like with clear, cool pink and rosy undertones that provide a delicate luminosity.
hairDescription: Your hair is a soft ash blonde with muted, cool tones that perfectly complement your low-contrast features.
eyeDescription: Your eyes are a gentle blue-grey, appearing misty and soft rather than sharply vivid.
seasonStory: You belong to the lightest and most delicate part of the Summer family. Your coloring is defined by coolness and a soft, diffused quality, meaning you look your absolute best in pastel and watercolor shades that don't overwhelm your natural ethereal beauty.

bestColors.name: Powder Blue
bestColors.reason: This soft, cool blue mirrors the coolness of your eyes and skin.

bestColors.name: Soft Rose
bestColors.reason: A delicate pink that harmonizes with your natural rosy undertones.

bestColors.name: Lavender
bestColors.reason: This light purple enhances the clarity of your fair skin without overpowering it.

bestColors.name: Pale Mint
bestColors.reason: A cool, muted green that brings out the freshness in your complexion.

bestColors.name: Blush Pink
bestColors.reason: The ultimate neutral-cool pink that looks completely natural on you.

bestColors.name: Periwinkle
bestColors.reason: Adds a soft pop of color that highlights the blue-grey in your eyes.

bestColors.name: Soft Lilac
bestColors.reason: A misty purple that complements the muted quality of your hair.

bestColors.name: Icy Pink
bestColors.reason: This very light, cool pink provides just enough contrast for your fair skin.

bestColors.name: Sky Blue
bestColors.reason: A classic Light Summer color that provides a crisp, clean look.

bestColors.name: Light Grey-Blue
bestColors.reason: The perfect sophisticated neutral that mimics your eye color.

bestColors.name: Rosewater
bestColors.reason: A barely-there pink that keeps your look light and airy.

bestColors.name: Pearl White
bestColors.reason: A soft, cool white is much more flattering on you than harsh optic white.

avoidColors.name: Bright Orange
avoidColors.reason: This warm, vivid color clashes aggressively with your cool, muted skin.

avoidColors.name: Mustard Yellow
avoidColors.reason: Earthiness and warmth make your skin look sallow or tired.

avoidColors.name: Chocolate Brown
avoidColors.reason: This deep, warm brown is too heavy and dark for your delicate contrast.

foundation.tip: Your porcelain skin looks best with sheer-to-medium coverage in a cool or pink-toned base to enhance your natural luminosity.

bronzer.tip: Avoid orange-based bronzers; look for 'ash' or 'cool' tones to simulate a natural shadow rather than a tan.

celebrities.name: Margot Robbie
celebrities.reason: She shares your delicate, cool blonde coloring and low-contrast features.

celebrities.name: Elle Fanning
celebrities.reason: Her porcelain skin and cool ash tones are a perfect match for your ethereal Light Summer palette.

celebrities.name: Amanda Seyfried
celebrities.reason: She has the classic Light Summer mix of fair skin and soft, cool blue eyes.

celebrities.name: Saoirse Ronan
celebrities.reason: Her cool-toned, light features are best enhanced by the same misty watercolor tones that suit you.
